item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektif memang sering menjadi prioritas, tetapi hak individu tidak bisa dikorbankan begitu saja.

notes: Agent A starts with agreement but caveats it, then shifts toward a balance/local-rights critique after Agent B's rights-focused turn. Agent B starts more opposed to the statement, then moves toward a balanced view that inclusive collective policy can work when local communities and individual agency are respected. Agent A has a small language artifact in turn 3: "hak orang individually".
